title: Gravy Delight
description: A small mod adding a new variant to the skeleton, the Inferno´s face opens up and shoots fire. The new enderman has a simple dash along with some minor buffs
body:
![blueSkeleton](https://i.postimg.cc/ht4v8qPb/Skelefreak-Geckolib.png)

The Inferno mob has a special attack and can use fire to access a more powerful attack. Plain fire will give the Inferno mob use of a stronger fire attack and soul fire will give the greatest attack with some small benefits such as area effect of fire resistance and minor healing to itself.

The Enderman, has a teleportation dash to close distance, and is stronger than the typical enderman, reflects arrows 2

** Required Geckolib**
https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib/version/lxzmD9V4


I hope it adds some interesting business to ya minecraft world
